creation_timestamp.description: Timestamp indicating when the snapshot was created

disk_size_gb.description: Size of the disk in GB from which the snapshot was created

effective_labels.description: Computed labels applied to the snapshot for metadata and organization

id.description: Unique identifier for referencing the snapshot in configurations

label_fingerprint.description: Fingerprint of the labels used for optimistic locking

licenses.description: List of licenses attached to the snapshot for compliance and usage

self_link.description: URL for accessing the snapshot resource in the GCP API

snapshot_id.description: Numeric ID assigned by GCP for uniquely identifying the snapshot

storage_bytes.description: Size of the snapshot's storage used, in bytes

terraform_labels.description: Labels defined in Terraform for organizing and filtering resources
